name: New Wave Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, and baking soda.
2. Add oil and 3/4 cup buttermilk. Stir until combined.
3. Lightly flour the work area. Place the dough on it and knead gently for half to one minute until formed into a ball.
4. Pat or roll out to approximately 1 inch thick (8-inch circle or individual servings).
5. Lay on a baking sheet.
6. Make glaze by mixing together 1 tablespoon buttermilk and 1 teaspoon sugar.
7. Brush the glaze over the dough.
8. Bake in a 425°F oven until browned, at least.
9. Cool on a rack.
10. Slice the shortcake in half. Spread half of the yogurt on the bottom.
11. Add half sliced strawberries.
12. Place the top layer and repeat with yogurt and strawberries.
